	Sometimes appears as Chief or King. ‘King Dai Lai’ in the online Brewitt-Taylor translation.

full_text:
Dailaidongzhu 帶來洞主
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dailaidongzhu (帶來洞主). Younger brother of Zhurong. Participated in the battle against Zhuge Liang. Dailaidongzhu is a fictional character. Dailaidongzhu was affiliated with Nanman.
